jobs.title: Senior TypeScript/Vue.js Developer (Swedish Ad Platform)
jobs.rawDescription: Company Description: Are you passionate about building scalable, high-performance front-end solutions? At Sigma Software, we are looking for a Senior TypeScript/Vue.js Developer to join our distributed team and help shape the future of a next-generation AdTech platform. You will work alongside talented engineers and contribute to transforming a complex monolithic system into a modern, API-driven architecture. We at Sigma Software value innovation, collaboration, and professional growth. Joining us means working on impactful projects with global reach, while enjoying a supportive environment that encourages learning and knowledge sharing. CUSTOMER Our Customer is a Swedish AdTech company that transforms the way publishers and advertisers interact. They provide state-of-the-art self-serve advertising platforms that enable seamless, direct transactions between advertisers and some of the world’s largest publishers. Their mission is to make advertising more accessible, automated, and efficient through innovative technology. Together, we serve globally recognized clients, including TripAdvisor, Bloomberg, The Washington Post, Opera, Dow Jones, etc. PROJECT The project represents a strategic transition to a Platform-First, API-driven architecture. The company is moving away from monolithic, client-specific codebases to a standardized ecosystem. As a Senior TypeScript/Vue.js Developer, you will be the technical visionary for the platforms, ensuring the technology remains high-performing and scalable. Job Description: • Define and lead front-end architecture strategy using Vue 3 with TypeScript, focusing on modularity, scalability, and performance • Collaborate with the Platform Team to design, document, and enforce API contracts optimized for low-latency AdTech requirements • Participate in system design to align front-end requirements with back-end architecture, supporting complex UI states and asynchronous data flows • Partner with DevOps to deploy and scale front-end so

score.reason: Perfect primary Vue 3 + TypeScript match with architectural focus at senior level. Role defines front-end strategy for AdTech platform, no gaps or conflicts. Remote with no geographic restrictions.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Primary Vue.js role at senior level with Spain explicitly listed and full remote. Salary within range; only learning curve is Sass instead of Tailwind.

jobs.rawDescription: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. The role As a Staff level LLM Interaction Engineer , you’ll help shape how n8n’s AI Workflow Builder works end-to-end. This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. That means building systems that consistently generate the right output, stay grounded in the user’s workflow, and improve quickly through iteration and evaluation. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, a

score.reason: Role emphasizes LLM orchestration and AI workflow systems. Vue and TypeScript are mentioned but secondary to the core AI engineering focus, which misaligns with Alfonso's frontend specialization.

jobs.title: Web-kehittäjä B2B-digimarkkinointiin (etätyö)
jobs.rawDescription: Etsimme lahjakasta web-kehittäjää vahvistamaan digimarkkinointitiimimme! Myymme yrityksille laadukkaita verkkosivuja, digimainontaa sekä sosiaalisen median ylläpitoa – ja nyt etsimme osaavaa tekijää toteuttamaan nämä projektit käytännössä. Tehtäväsi Pääasiallinen tehtäväsi on toteuttaa asiakkaille laadukkaita verkkosivuja sekä some- ja mainoskampanjoita. Saat toimeksiannot valmiiksi neuvotelluista projekteista ja vastaat toteutuksen laadusta alusta loppuun. Palkkaus Täysin provisiopohjainen – provisio maksetaan, kun asiakas on ostanut palvelun ja projekti on toimitettu Realistinen ansaintataso aktiivisella tekemisellä on erittäin kilpailukykyinen – ylöspäin ei rajaa Myöhemmin mahdollisuus neuvotella kiinteämmästä yhteistyömallista Lisätulomahdollisuus, jos sinulla on myös myynti- tai asiakashankintaosaamista Tarjoamme sinulle Valmiiksi hankitut asiakkaat ja projektit – sinun ei tarvitse myydä Selkeät briiffit ja toimivat prosessit Jatkuva tuki ja sparraus tiimiltä Joustavat työajat – päätät itse milloin ja miten teet 100 % etätyö – voit työskennellä mistä päin maailmaa tahansa Hyvät bonukset pidemmästä yhteistyöstä Odotamme sinulta Osaamista verkkosivujen toteutuksesta (esim. WordPress, WebflowHTML, CSS ja JavaScript) Kokemus moderneista frameworkeista (React, Vue, tai vastaava) Perustietämystä some-markkinoinnista tai digimainonnasta on eduksi Itseohjautuvuutta ja kykyä toimittaa projektit sovitussa aikataulussa Huolellisuutta ja laatutietoisuutta – asiakkaan tyytyväisyys on prioriteetti Halua oppia ja kehittyä digitaalisen markkinoinnin kentällä Pakolliset työkalut Laskutusvalmius esim. kevytyrittäjänä (opastamme tarvittaessa alkuun) Jos olet taitava tekijä, joka haluaa tehdä koodausta ja verkkosivuprojekteja joustavasti omaan tahtiisi – tämä on loistava mahdollisuus sinulle! Kerro hakemuksessa: – Mitä teknologioita ja työkaluja osaat – Näytä esimerkkejä aiemmista töistäsi (portfolio tai linkit) Odotamme innolla kuulevamme sinusta! Location: Helsinki, FI

jobs.title: Haemme kokenutta Full Stack -kehittäjää Cloud Native -yksikköömme
jobs.rawDescription: Position Description CGI on yksi suurimmista IT- ja liiketoimintakonsultoinnin yrityksistä Suomessa ja maailmalla. Vahva kokemuksemme eri toimialoilta auttaa julkisen ja yksityisen sektorin asiakkaitamme onnistumaan digitaalisessa muutoksessa ja saavuttamaan tavoitteitaan entistä tehokkaammin. Haemme kokenutta Full Stack -kehittäjää Cloud Native -yksikköömme vahvistamaan kaupan toimialan osaamistamme CGI:n Cloud Native -tiimissä rakennamme maailmanluokan digitaalisia ratkaisuja moderneilla teknologioilla, hyödyntäen pilvipalveluita ja tekoälyä. Kehittämämme erityisesti skaalautuvia ja liiketoimintakriittisiä ratkaisuja kaupan toimialalle, kuten verkkokaupparatkaisuja, jotka tukevat asiakkaidemme kasvua ja asiakaskokemuksen kehittämistä. Työskentelemme merkittävien suomalaisten ja kansainvälisten toimijoiden kanssa, ja meillä on vahva jalansija kaupan toimialalla. Toteutamme digitaalisia palveluita ja verkkokaupparatkaisuja mm. Keskolle, Postille, Sanomalle, Finnairille ja Matkahuollolle - muutamia esimerkkejä mainitaksemme. Projektimme liittyvät esimerkiksi asiakaspolkujen optimointiin sekä monikanavaisten kaupankäyntikokemuksen kehittämiseen. Mitä teknologioita käytämme? Seuraamme aktiivisesti alan ja teknologioiden kehitystä. Edellytämme vähintään kuuden vuoden kokemusta seuraavista: Pilvipalvelut • AWS / Azure • Pääosin serverless-arkkitehtuurilla toteutetut ratkaisut Ohjelmointikielet ja -ympäristöt • JavaScript / TypeScript • Node.js Modernit frontend-teknologiat • React, Next.js, Gatsby.js, Vue DevOps ja automaatio • CI/CD (automaatioputket) • Kontit (Docker, Kubernetes) • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) Lisäksi arvostamme kokemusta mobiilikehityksestä sekä ymmärrystä verkkokauppojen erityispiirteistä, kuten suorituskyvyn optimoinnista, integraatioista (maksu-, logistiikka- ja tuotejärjestelmät) sekä datavetoisesta kehittämisestä. Tehtävässä onnistuminen edellyttää myös käytännön kokemusta tekoälyn hyödyntämisestä ohjelmistokehityksessä esim

Our platform lets analysts train custom object and change detection models on satellite/aerial/drone imagery in minutes, then reconstructs 3D terrain from those detections. If you want to work on distributed systems that run in a data center one day and an edge laptop the next, we have interesting problems. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high-performance culture is driven by our values and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. Co-create the future with us as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software. An overview of this role As a frontend engineer on the Plan: Product Planning team you’ll work primarily on the work-items views. Read more in our epics: lists, agile boards, table view, saved views. We’re currently a team of 5 backend, 3 frontend, and 1 fullstack engineer, a product manager, an engineering manager, and a designer. We work in smaller sub-teams of 2-5 engineers focusing on a single project for 1-3 months. Every month one engineer is assigned to the quality rotation working on performance, monitoring, security vulnerabilities, and maintenance issues. We meet once a week, project teams can have their own calls, but we mostly work asynchronously. We mostly work with Vue.js and Apollo Client moving GitLab into the SPA-like experienc

Writing clear deployment documentation and operational runbooks is also part of the role. Interested? If this opportunity caught your interest, please tell us more about yourself and your background by submitting your CV and a short application as soon as possible, along with your salary expectation. The recruitment process is already ongoing, and the position will

needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK About Sentry Bad software is everywhere, and we’re tired of it. Sentry is on a mission to help developers write better software faster so we can get back to enjoying technology. With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you like to selfishly build things that make your digital life better, come help us build the next generation of software monitoring tools. About this role Are you ready to redefine the future of JavaScript development? Are you a seasoned JavaScript expert who gets a thrill from tackling complex challenges across the entire JavaScript ecosystem? Do you believe that AI can be a powerful partner in crafting elegant, high-impact code? If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. You'll be at the forefront, working on: A Universe of JavaScript Challenges: Dive deep into our extensive suite of JavaScript SDKs, with a broad focus on framework support spanning the mode
